name: Task Scheduler
description: Given a list of tasks represented by characters and a non-negative integer n representing the cooldown interval between two same tasks, return the least number of intervals the CPU will take to finish all the given tasks. Each task takes one unit of time. During the cooldown interval, the CPU can either execute a different task or remain idle. Tasks can be executed in any order.
signature: def least_interval(tasks: list[str], n: int) -> int:
constraints: tasks[i] is an uppercase English letter
Tasks can be executed in any order
